description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image globally and overrides it with node:8 for the build-project job, and caches the node_modules directory. Add a build-project job (default stage) that runs the following shell commands in order: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium; apt-get -yq install git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release". The job should publish coverage/, doc/ and dist/ as artifacts that expire in 1 day and record test coverage using the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on the master branch, executes ls -l, mkdir .public, moves coverage/ and doc/ into .public, renames .public to public, and stores the public/ directory as an artifact that expires in 90 days.
